display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Active ability 'Bloodpact' triples your current Spell Lifesteal for 5 seconds. Significantly amplifies spell healing during critical engagements or while taking damage. This allows for dramatic survivability spikes but has a long cooldown. Stats: CD: 30s, Spell Lifesteal: +25%, Health: +450, Mana: +450, Mana Regen: +3.

display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Provides a significant health and mana pool boost alongside strong mana regeneration. Its stat profile is tailored for spellcasters who need durability and extended mana sustain for fights. Stats: Health: +450, Mana: +450, Mana Regen: +3.

display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Core survivability item for durable spellcasters. Transforms spell damage into healing, allowing heroes to stay in fights longer and turn engagements with a powerful health and mana burst. The activated Bloodpact provides a critical defensive steroid in prolonged battles.

display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Strong against lineups relying on burst magic damage, as the health pool and Spell Lifesteal can mitigate and heal through sustained spell-based harassment. Less effective against heroes with Break (which disables passives) or heavy physical burst damage that ignores lifesteal.

display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Synergizes exceptionally with heroes who have high-damage, spammable AoE spells (e.g., Leshrac, Timbersaw). Also a powerful late-game option for any spellcaster needing to amplify their sustain and survive through focus fire in the late game.

display_text: Bloodstone, Cost: 4350: Provides solid farming utility through its mana sustain and health pool, allowing heroes to spam spells to clear waves and jungle camps without returning to base. The raw HP also makes tanking jungle camps and Roshan more viable. Stats: Mana Regen: +3, Mana: +450.
